description_long: This car store is a single-story commercial building with a rectangular footprint, constructed primarily of red brick walls and featuring large, multi-pane glass windows on the front and rear facades. The front area includes a paved parking lot with five cars of various colors and models parked directly in front of the main entrance. Inside, the building is divided into several rooms, including a main showroom area with desks and office furniture, as well as smaller partitioned offices and a back room with shelving. The interior is finished with wood flooring and patterned wallpaper, and the space is well-lit by natural light from the expansive windows. The overall design is functional and straightforward, with a focus on showcasing vehicles and providing office space for staff.
description: A brick car store with large glass windows, a front parking lot displaying five cars, and a partitioned interior with showroom and office spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and five cars parked in the lot.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the building, a window on the brick wall, and a glimpse into the interior office and back room.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large glass windows, partitioned office spaces, and the back room with shelving.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the parking lot, side brick wall, and interior layout with desks and furniture.
attribute_displayed_cars: Five cars are displayed in front of the building: one red sedan, one purple sedan, one blue pickup truck, one white sedan, and one black sedan, all parked side by side.
attribute_glass_facade: Large framed glass windows span the front and rear facades, providing extensive visibility into the showroom and offices.
attribute_showroom_lighting: No visible artificial lighting fixtures; natural light is provided by the large glass windows.
attribute_architectural_style: Functional commercial with industrial and minimalist elements, characterized by brick construction and large glass windows.
